calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Paul H. Liederman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Union Bank, a National Bank, fka Union Bank of California, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Samuel Joseph Conti, an individual, also known as Sam Plotnik, also known as Samuel Cortti, also known as Samuel C. Conti.
Default was entered against defendant on August 3, 2009. Doe defendants were dismissed on October 6, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 6, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Union Bank, a National Bank, fka Union Bank of California, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Samuel Joseph Conti, an individual, also known as Sam Plotnik, also known as Samuel Cortti, also known as Samuel C. Conti as follows:

Damages/Principal - $191,552.67.
Prejudgment Interest - $25,750.79.
Attorney Fees - $3,717.00.
Late Charges - $105.00.
Costs - $561.11, for a total judgment in the amount of $221,686.57.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2009 Continued To Dec-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
